entry.title: 墨韵书斋：开篇
entry.content:
博观而约取，厚积而薄发。 —— 苏轼

展卷

余本布衣，躬耕于代码，不求闻达于诸侯。然好学不倦，乐于分享。今建此博客，愿与同道中人共论技术、话人生。

墨香

在此墨韵书斋中，我将记录：

  • 技术之道：于代码海洋中探寻真理。
  • 笔墨情怀：赏析古今诗词，抒发心中块垒。
  • 生活雅趣：记录浮生半日闲的惬意。

愿此地能成为诸君灵魂的栖息之所。

/* 墨韵书斋 - 古风博客定制样式 */:root { --bg: #f7f3eb; --bg-paper: #fffdf7; --bg-dark: #ebe5d8; --fg: #2d2a26; --fg-muted: #6b635a; --accent: #8b4513; --accent-light: #a0522d; --accent-gold: #b8860b; --ink: #1a1814; --ink-light: #3d3830; --border: #d4c8b8; --shadow: rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.12); --vermilion: #c41e3a; /* Butterfly 变量重写 */ --global-bg: var(--bg); --card-bg: var(--bg-paper); --text-bg-hover: var(--accent); --light-grey: var(--border); --dark-grey: var(--fg-muted); --white: var(--bg-paper); --selection-bg: var(--accent); --selection-color: var(--bg-paper);}/* 导入古风字体 */@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Ma+Shan+Zheng&family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@400;500;600;700&family=ZCOOL+XiaoWei&display=swap');body { font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', serif !important; background-color: var(--bg) !important; color: var(--fg) !important; line-height: 1.9;}/* 标题字体 */#site-title, #site-subtitle, .article-title, .aside-list-item .title, .card-widget .item-headline span, .recent-post-item .article-title { font-family: 'Ma Shan Zheng', 'STKaiti', cursive !important; font-weight: normal !important;}/* 水墨纹理背景 */.ink-texture { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; opacity: 0.5; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); mix-blend-mode: multiply;}/* 山水背景 */.mountain-bg { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 50%; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; opacity: 0.08; background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--ink) 0%, transparent 100%); -webkit-mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 1200 500' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M0 500 L0 350 Q100 300 200 330 Q350 250 500 300 Q650 200 800 280 Q950 220 1100 290 Q1150 270 1200 300 L1200 500 Z' fill='white'/%3E%3Cpath d='M0 500 L0 380 Q150 340 300 370 Q500 300 700 350 Q900 310 1200 360 L1200 500 Z' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 1200 500' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M0 500 L0 350 Q100 300 200 330 Q350 250 500 300 Q650 200 800 280 Q950 220 1100 290 Q1150 270 1200 300 L1200 500 Z' fill='white'/%3E%3Cpath d='M0 500 L0 380 Q150 340 300 370 Q500 300 700 350 Q900 310 1200 360 L1200 500 Z' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); mask-size: cover; mask-position: bottom; -webkit-mask-size: cover; -webkit-mask-position: bottom;}/* 飘落花瓣 */.petal { position: fixed; width: 10px; height: 12px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, #f8c8d8 0%, #e8a8b8 50%, #d08898 100%); border-radius: 50% 0 50% 50%; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 100; animation: fall linear infinite;}@keyframes fall { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(0deg) translateX(0); } 10% { opacity: 0.7; } 90% { opacity: 0.4; } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(720deg) translateX(100px); }}/* 卷轴卡片效果 */#aside-content .card-widget, #recent-posts > .recent-post-item, .layout > div:first-child:not(.recent-posts) { background: var(--bg-paper) !important; border: 1px solid var(--border) !important; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px var(--shadow) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.4s ease;}#aside-content .card-widget:hover, #recent-posts > .recent-post-item:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px var(--shadow) !important;}#aside-content .card-widget::before, #recent-posts > .recent-post-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 16px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.06), transparent); pointer-events: none;}/* 印章 Logo 效果 */#site-name::before { content: '墨'; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 2px solid var(--vermilion); border-radius: 2px; color: var(--vermilion); font-family: 'Ma Shan Zheng', cursive; margin-right: 10px; transform: rotate(-3deg); font-size: 1.2rem; line-height: 1;}/* 导航栏定制 */#nav { background: rgba(247, 243, 235, 0.9) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: 0 2px 20px var(--shadow);}#nav a { color: var(--fg-muted) !important; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 500;}#nav a:hover { color: var(--accent) !important;}/* 首页 Banner 调整 */#page-header.full_page { background-color: var(--bg-dark) !important;}#site-info { padding: 40px; background: rgba(255, 253, 247, 0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid rgba(212, 200, 184, 0.3);}/* 按钮古风化 */.btn-beautify, #to_top, #submit-comment { background: var(--accent) !important; border-radius: 2px !important; font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', serif; color: var(--bg-paper) !important;}#to_top { background: var(--bg-paper) !important; color: var(--accent) !important; border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;}#to_top:hover { background: var(--accent) !important; color: var(--bg-paper) !important;}/* 侧边栏标题定制 */.card-widget .item-headline { color: var(--accent) !important; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 5px;}/* 诗词引用效果 (Blockquote) */blockquote { background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--bg-dark), var(--bg-paper)) !important; border-left: 3px solid var(--accent) !important; font-style: normal; font-family: 'ZCOOL XiaoWei', serif; padding: 15px 25px !important; margin: 20px 0 !important; color: var(--ink-light);}/* 分割线古风化 */hr { border: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--border), transparent); margin: 40px 0;}/* 文章页代码块稍微调整 */#article-container figure.highlight { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;}

/* 墨韵书斋 - 古风动态特效脚本 */(function() { const initGufeng = () => { const body = document.body; // 1. 注入背景元素 if (!document.querySelector('.ink-texture')) { const ink = document.createElement('div'); ink.className = 'ink-texture'; body.appendChild(ink); } if (!document.querySelector('.mountain-bg')) { const mountain = document.createElement('div'); mountain.className = 'mountain-bg'; body.appendChild(mountain); } // 2. 初始化花瓣容器 let petalContainer = document.getElementById('petals-container'); if (!petalContainer) { petalContainer = document.createElement('div'); petalContainer.id = 'petals-container'; petalContainer.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99;'; body.appendChild(petalContainer); } // 3. 花瓣生成逻辑 const createPetal = () => { const petal = document.createElement('div'); petal.className = 'petal'; petal.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%'; const duration = Math.random() * 10 + 10; // 10-20s const delay = Math.random() * 5; petal.style.animationDuration = duration + 's'; petal.style.animationDelay = delay + 's'; petal.style.transform = `scale(${Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5})`; petalContainer.appendChild(petal); // 动画结束后移除元素，防止 DOM 过多导致卡顿 setTimeout(() => { petal.remove(); }, (duration + delay) * 1000); }; // 每隔一段时间生成新花瓣 const petalInterval = setInterval(() => { if (document.hidden) return; // 标签页隐藏时不生成 if (petalContainer.children.length < 15) { // 限制同屏数量保证流畅 createPetal(); } }, 2000); // 4. 数字动画 (针对 Butterfly 的 card-archives 等统计) const animateNumbers = () => { const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.card-archives-count, .card-category-list-count, .card-tag-cloud-count'); counters.forEach(counter => { const target = parseInt(counter.innerText); if (isNaN(target)) return; let count = 0; const speed = target / 50; // 动画分50步完成 const updateCount = () => { count += speed; if (count < target) { counter.innerText = Math.floor(count); requestAnimationFrame(updateCount); } else { counter.innerText = target; } }; updateCount(); }); }; // 延迟执行数字动画 setTimeout(animateNumbers, 1000); }; // 兼容 PJAX if (typeof pjax !== 'undefined') { document.addEventListener('pjax:complete', initGufeng); } // 初始加载 if (document.readyState === 'complete') { initGufeng(); } else { window.addEventListener('load', initGufeng); }})();
